summary: OpenSquilla is a token-efficient AI agent designed to optimize interactions across various platforms, including CLI, web UI, and chat channels. It aims to enhance capability and results while maintaining budget efficiency through a microkernel architecture and a local model router.
use_cases: Integrating AI capabilities into a customer support chat system
Developing a command-line tool that utilizes multiple AI models for data processing
Creating a web application that leverages AI for personalized user experiences
